content.json:
# SpyCloud Identity Link Dashboard
**Identity Correlation Intelligence** - Discover linked identities, associated accounts, and identity clusters from SpyCloud IdLink data.

> This workbook focuses exclusively on SpyCloudIdLink_CL data for analyzing identity relationships and cross-account correlations.

---

parameters.name: SeverityFilter
parameters.query: SpyCloudIdLink_CL | distinct severity | order by severity desc
parameters.label: Severity

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(Label:string, Value:long, Order:int)["Total Link Records", 0, 1, "Unique Identities", 0, 2, "Linked Accounts", 0, 3, "High Severity Links", 0, 4]),
(SpyCloudIdLink_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize v=count() | extend Label="Total Link Records", Order=1 | project Label, Value=v, Order),
(SpyCloudIdLink_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize v=dcount(email) | extend Label="Unique Identities", Order=2 | project Label, Value=v, Order),
(SpyCloudIdLink_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize v=dcount(linked_email) | extend Label="Linked Accounts", Order=3 | project Label, Value=v, Order),
(SpyCloudIdLink_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where severity >= 20 | summarize v=count() | extend Label="High Severity Links", Order=4 | project Label, Value=v, Order)
| summarize Value=max(Value) by Label, Order
| order by Order asc
content.title: Identity Link Overview

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudIdLink_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and isnotempty(email)
| summarize LinkedAccounts=dcount(linked_email), TotalRecords=count(), MaxSeverity=max(severity), LatestLink=max(TimeGenerated) by email
| extend RiskLevel = case(MaxSeverity == 25, "CRITICAL", MaxSeverity == 20, "HIGH", MaxSeverity == 5, "MEDIUM", "LOW")
| top 25 by LinkedAccounts desc
| project Identity=email, RiskLevel, LinkedAccounts, TotalRecords, LatestLink)
content.title: Identities with Most Linked Accounts

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudIdLink_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize NewLinks=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
| order by TimeGenerated asc)
content.title: Identity Link Discovery Trend (Daily)

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudIdLink_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend SeverityLabel = case(severity == 25, "Critical", severity == 20, "High", severity == 5, "Medium", severity == 2, "Low", "Other")
| summarize Count=count() by SeverityLabel)
content.title: Link Severity Distribution

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudIdLink_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and isnotempty(email_domain)
| summarize UniqueIdentities=dcount(email), TotalLinks=count() by tostring(email_domain)
| order by TotalLinks desc
| take 15)
content.title: Identity Links by Email Domain
